rules.rule_text:
rule psexec_generic
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "Sysinternals PsExec Generic"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.2"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "PsInfSvc"
		$s2 = "%s -install"
		$s3 = "%s -remove"
		$s4 = "psexec" nocase

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
